summary:
**Key Developments:**

* **AI-powered editing tool for Mac:** knooth, a screen recording app with AI-powered editing, was launched on Product Hunt.
* **Local predictive memory for AI agents:** Khaos Brain, a local predictive memory for AI agents, was launched on Product Hunt.
* **AI SEO auditor:** Free AI SEO Auditor, a tool to audit websites for the AI search era, was launched on Product Hunt.
* **Real-time AI dubbing for YouTube videos:** Yeta AI, a real-time AI dubbing tool for YouTube videos, was launched on Product Hunt.
* **AI reporting analyst:** Zappy by ZapDigits, an AI reporting analyst tool, was launched on Product Hunt.
* **AI data agent:** Bruin, an AI data agent that collaborates with teams, was launched on Product Hunt.

**Trend:** **Rise of AI-powered productivity tools:** The recent Product Hunt launches highlight a growing trend of AI-powered productivity tools, with a focus on automation, efficiency, and collaboration. These tools aim to simplify complex tasks and help professionals work smarter and faster.
